positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a soaring golden retriever puppy running through a vibrant field of stylized wildflowers. The composition should be central and dynamic, with the dog forming a strong, joyful silhouette against a gradient sky of warm sunset oranges and deep indigo. Incorporate strong graphic lines, Art Deco influence, and bold, flat color areas, reminiscent of screen-printed textiles. High contrast, clean edges, vector art aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing, limited color palette.
